scientific_estimand: protocol-certified all-outcome state versus target-only, rejection, naive pooling, and paired affine multi-fidelity under matched deterministic reveals

hard_gates.homogeneous_null: persistent sufficient state and same-order full-history replay must have identical natural-parameter checksums, predictions, actions, and metric inputs every round
hard_gates.rejection_parity: target_only and protocol_rejection must be exactly identical every round
hard_gates.transport_certificate: split-conformal radius must be finite and <= 0.15 eV/atom before evaluation
hard_gates.oracle_isolation: evaluation target outcomes may enter only reveal updates and evaluator metrics
hard_gates.no_outcome_deletion: accepted outcome count must equal all direct plus all certificate-compatible transported observations

pilot_go_rule.scope: mechanism continuation only, not paper-level superiority
requirements: certified_all_outcome_state has lower system-macro hull decision cost than both target_only and naive_full_history_pooling
certified_all_outcome_state has lower system-macro one-step decision regret than both target_only and naive_full_history_pooling
evaluation transport certificate violation rate is <= 0.15
improvement is not confined to one chemical-complexity stratum
pilot_go_rule.paired_only_warning: if paired_affine_multifidelity explains all improvement, the result supports ordinary delta learning but not a broader decision-state claim
